subject: RE: Patricia : Jeffrey message
body:
I have relayed!

 

From: J. Epstein [mailto:jeeproject@yahoo.com] 
Sent: Tuesday, March 11, 2008 9:44 AM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Re: Patricia : Jeffrey message

 

i didn't know you were here sorry.. call friday 212 750 9895

----- Original Message ----
From: Lesley Groff <lesley@nysgllc.com>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Monday, March 10, 2008 5:45:34 PM
Subject: FW: Patricia : Jeffrey message

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Lesley Groff

Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein

 

 

 

________________________________

From: Patricia Neville [mailto:sskkyy17@gmail.com] 
Sent: Sunday, March 09, 2008 9:33 AM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Patricia : Jeffrey message

Hi Lesley,

 

Hope all is well with you. Thank you for passing this on.

 

 

Jeffrey,

 

 I often walk by your office,  and have to laugh at the fact that we'd
run into each other on the corner 20 years after first meeting. Now that
I mention it, I suspect it isn't often you met people on the Maharishi
Campus either!  Something I know I'll never forget!

 

I'm still focused on working with Wilhelmina NY.  I've picked up a
German agent & hoping a London agency accepts me as well. Ready for some
travel. This is a niche market and I need to push hard to be one of the
few in my age category working. I'm going to give it until Dec., and
decide if I remain in this industry or move on to make some retirement
cash! ha ha..

 

In the meantime, I am loving this city. It has me very spoiled. Not sure
I can live anywhere else now that I've experienced this.

 

Thinking of and sending prayers your way. 

 

If you prefer not to receive more e-mails let me know. I'm just hoping
it gives you a little something to laugh about.

 

Take Care,

 

Patricia

Hi Lesley,

 

Hope all is well with you. Thank you for passing this on.

 

 

Jeffrey,

 

 I often walk by your office,  and have to laugh at the fact that we'd run into each other on the corner 20 years after first meeting. Now that I mention it, I suspect it isn't often you met people on the Maharishi Campus either!  Something I know I'll never forget!

 

I'm still focused on working with Wilhelmina NY.  I've picked up a German agent & hoping a London agency accepts me as well. Ready for some travel. This is a niche market and I need to push hard to be one of the few in my age category working. I'm going to give it until Dec., and decide if I remain in this industry or move on to make some retirement cash! ha ha..

 

In the meantime, I am loving this city. It has me very spoiled. Not sure I can live anywhere else now that I've experienced this.

 

Thinking of and sending prayers your way.

 

If you prefer not to receive more e-mails let me know. I'm just hoping it gives you a little something to laugh about.
